title: H002: Complete CI pipeline and coverage setup
description:
**Size:** 🏗️ large
**Category:** infrastructure
**Priority:** high

## Open Questions

All questions from the initial elaboration have been answered by the user. No remaining ambiguities.

## Summary

Extend the existing `.github/workflows/ci.yaml` (S018) into a full job matrix covering lint, unit tests, integration tests (per operator), E2E tests (kind + Chainsaw), operator Docker image build-and-push to GHCR, and Helm chart OCI push. Add `v*` tag triggers so tagged commits produce versioned images (SemVer stripped from git tag), charts, and a GitHub Release. Create a `.codecov.yml` with component-level coverage thresholds (80% `internal/common/`, 70% operator controllers, 90% webhooks). Use `codecov/codecov-action` for coverage upload.

## Scope

**Included:**
- Extend `ci.yaml` `on.push` trigger to include `tags: ["v*"]`
- **Lint job**: retain existing `lint` (golangci-lint v2.11.3) + `shellcheck` jobs unchanged
- **Test job (unit)**: refactor existing single `test` job into a matrix strategy over `[common, keystone, c5c3]` with `-coverprofile` output per module
- **Test job (integration)**: un-stub `test-integration` Makefile target; add per-operator matrix job with `setup-envtest` binary
- **Coverage upload**: `codecov/codecov-action` with flag-based component separation in both `test` and `test-integration` jobs
- **E2E infra job**: retain existing `e2e-infra` job unchanged
- **E2E keystone job**: new job — build operator Docker image, `kind load docker-image`, deploy via Helm chart, run Chainsaw keystone test suites from `tests/e2e/keystone/`
- **Build-and-push job**: build `operators/keystone/Dockerfile`, push to GHCR; image tag = SemVer from git tag (strip `v` prefix) or `main`-branch SHA; conditional on `main` push or `v*` tag; uses `docker/metadata-action` for tag derivation
- **Helm-push job**: `helm package` on `operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/`, `helm push` to `oci://ghcr.io/<owner>/charts/`; conditional on `main` push or `v*` tag
- **GitHub Release job**: on `v*` tags only, `gh release create` attaching Helm chart tarball; uses GitHub auto-generated release notes
- **Verify-codegen job**: new gate job running `make manifests && make generate && git diff --exit-code` + `make verify-crd-sync` (from S025)
- **Implement `docker-build` Makefile target**: currently stubbed with error; must support `OPERATOR=<op>` parameter
- **Implement `helm-package` Makefile target**: currently stubbed with error; must support `OPERATOR=<op>` parameter
- **Implement `test-integration` Makefile target**: currently stubbed; wire envtest-based integration tests
- **`.codecov.yml`**: new file with component thresholds — 80% `internal/common/`, 70% `operators/*/internal/controller/`, 90% `operators/*/api/`

**Excluded:**
- Modifying `build-images.yaml` (handles OpenStack service container images — separate concern, different tag strategy with SBOM/signing)
- Modifying `cleanup-images.yaml`, `verify-container-images.yaml`, `deploy-docs.yaml` (unrelated workflows)
- SBOM generation / cosign signing for operator images (not requested; can follow `build-images.yaml` patterns later)
- c5c3-operator Dockerfile (doesn't exist yet; S022 creates it — matrix prepared to accommodate it)
- Release notes generation logic beyond GitHub auto-generated notes
- Branch protection rules or required status checks configuration
- Changes to existing `e2e-infra` job logic
- Changes to `.golangci.yml` lint configuration

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    trigger["on.push: main / PR / tags v*"]

    subgraph gates["Gate Jobs #40;always#41;"]
        lint["lint #40;golangci-lint#41;"]
        shellcheck["shellcheck #40;hack/*.sh#41;"]
        verify["verify-codegen #40;manifests + generate + crd-sync#41;"]
        test["test #40;matrix: common, keystone, c5c3#41;"]
        testint["test-integration #40;matrix: keystone, c5c3#41;"]
    end

    subgraph e2e_group["E2E Jobs"]
        e2einfra["e2e-infra #40;existing: kind + Chainsaw infra#41;"]
        e2eop["e2e-keystone #40;build image + kind load + Helm deploy + Chainsaw#41;"]
    end

    subgraph publish["Publish Jobs #40;main / v* tags only#41;"]
        buildpush["build-and-push #40;keystone operator image to GHCR#41;"]
        helmpush["helm-push #40;OCI push to GHCR#41;"]
    end

    subgraph release_group["Release Job #40;v* tags only#41;"]
        ghrelease["github-release #40;gh release create + chart tarball#41;"]
    end

    codecov["Upload coverage to Codecov"]

    trigger --> gates
    test --> codecov
    testint --> codecov
    gates --> e2e_group
    gates --> publish
    publish --> release_group
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Tag as Git Tag v*
    participant CI as ci.yaml
    participant GHCR as ghcr.io
    participant GH as GitHub Releases

    Tag->>CI: Trigger full pipeline
    CI->>CI: Gate jobs #40;lint, test, verify, E2E#41;
    CI->>GHCR: docker push operator:0.1.0
    CI->>GHCR: helm push oci://charts/keystone-operator:0.1.0
    CI->>GH: gh release create v0.1.0 + chart tarball
```

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph codecov_cfg[".codecov.yml Thresholds"]
        common["internal/common/ >= 80%"]
        controllers["operators/*/internal/controller/ >= 70%"]
        webhooks["operators/*/api/ >= 90%"]
    end
```

## Key Components

- **`ci.yaml` trigger extension**: Add `tags: ["v*"]` to `on.push.branches` sibling, enabling tag-triggered full pipeline runs
- **`verify-codegen` job**: New gate job — `make manifests && make generate && git diff --exit-code` + `make verify-crd-sync`; catches uncommitted generated code before merge
- **`test` job (matrix)**: Refactor existing single `test` job into matrix strategy over `[common, keystone, c5c3]`; each entry runs with `-coverprofile` and uploads to Codecov with component flags
- **`test-integration` job**: Un-stub `test-integration` Makefile target; new CI job with per-operator matrix, `setup-envtest` for kubebuilder assets, `-coverprofile` output, Codecov upload
- **Codecov upload step**: `codecov/codecov-action` in `test` and `test-integration` jobs; uses `flags` parameter for component-level threshold matching in `.codecov.yml`
- **`e2e-keystone` job**: New job — `docker build` operator image, `kind load docker-image`, `helm install` from `operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/`, run Chainsaw tests from `tests/e2e/keystone/` (12 existing suites); depends on gate jobs passing
- **`build-and-push` job**: `docker/build-push-action` building `operators/keystone/Dockerfile`; `docker/metadata-action` derives tags (SemVer from `v*` tag, `main` branch SHA); pushes to GHCR; conditional on `github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'` or `startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')`
- **`helm-push` job**: `helm package operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/` → `helm push` to `oci://ghcr.io/<owner>/charts/`; chart version set from git tag; same push conditions as `build-and-push`
- **`github-release` job**: On `v*` tags only; `gh release create ${{ github.ref_name }} --generate-notes` attaching packaged Helm chart tarball as release asset
- **`docker-build` Makefile target**: Replace current stub with `docker build -t $(IMG) -f operators/$(OPERATOR)/Dockerfile .` supporting `OPERATOR` and `IMG` variables
- **`helm-package` Makefile target**: Replace current stub with `helm package operators/$(OPERATOR)/helm/$(OPERATOR)-operator/` supporting `OPERATOR` variable
- **`test-integration` Makefile target**: Replace current stub with envtest-based test runner, filtering to `*/internal/controller/...` packages with build tag `integration`
- **`.codecov.yml`**: New file with `coverage.status.project` and `coverage.status.patch` settings; component definitions mapping `internal/common/**` → 80%, `operators/*/internal/controller/**` → 70%, `operators/*/api/**` → 90%

stories.title: Developer gets per-module coverage feedback on every PR
stories.want: unit tests to run as a matrix over [common, keystone, c5c3] with per-module coverage profiles uploaded to Codecov
stories.so_that: I can see which module a coverage regression originates from and address it before merge
criteria: CI test job uses matrix strategy with entries: common, keystone, c5c3
Each matrix entry produces a -coverprofile output file
codecov/codecov-action uploads each profile with a component-specific flag
Codecov dashboard shows separate coverage metrics per module

stories.title: Developer gets integration test results in CI
stories.want: the test-integration Makefile target to run real envtest-based tests and the CI workflow to include an integration test job
stories.so_that: controller logic is validated against a real API server before merge
criteria: make test-integration runs envtest-based tests for operators with integration test files
CI includes a test-integration job with matrix over [keystone, c5c3]
setup-envtest binary is used to download kubebuilder assets
Coverage profiles from integration tests are uploaded to Codecov with separate flags

stories.title: Developer sees codegen drift caught before merge
stories.want: a verify-codegen CI gate that runs make manifests, make generate, and make verify-crd-sync and fails if any files changed
stories.so_that: generated code drift is caught automatically instead of discovered in production
criteria: verify-codegen job runs make manifests && make generate && git diff --exit-code
verify-codegen job runs make verify-crd-sync
Job fails with a clear diff output when generated files are stale
Job is a gate (blocks merge) alongside lint, test, shellcheck

stories.title: Release engineer gets versioned operator images from git tags
stories.want: pushing a v* git tag to trigger building and pushing the operator Docker image to GHCR with the SemVer version as the image tag
stories.so_that: tagged releases produce immutable, versioned container images for production deployment
criteria: ci.yaml on.push triggers include tags: ['v*']
build-and-push job builds operators/keystone/Dockerfile
docker/metadata-action derives image tag: SemVer (v prefix stripped) for tags, SHA for main
Image is pushed to ghcr.io/<owner>/keystone-operator:<version>
Job runs only on main push or v* tag (not on PRs)

stories.title: Release engineer gets versioned Helm charts from git tags
stories.want: pushing a v* git tag to trigger packaging and pushing the Helm chart to GHCR OCI registry
stories.so_that: FluxCD HelmReleases can reference versioned chart OCI artifacts
criteria: helm-push job runs helm package on operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/
helm push pushes to oci://ghcr.io/<owner>/charts/
Chart version matches the git tag SemVer
Job runs only on main push or v* tag (not on PRs)

stories.title: Release engineer gets GitHub Releases with artifacts on tagged commits
stories.want: a v* tag to automatically create a GitHub Release with auto-generated notes and the Helm chart tarball attached
stories.so_that: stakeholders can track releases and download artifacts from a single location
criteria: github-release job triggers only on v* tags
gh release create is called with --generate-notes
Packaged Helm chart tarball is attached as a release asset
Release title matches the tag name

stories.title: Developer gets E2E validation of the Keystone operator in CI
stories.want: a CI job that builds the operator image, loads it into a kind cluster, deploys via Helm, and runs Chainsaw E2E tests
stories.so_that: operator functionality is validated end-to-end before merge
criteria: e2e-keystone job builds the operator Docker image locally
Image is loaded into kind cluster via kind load docker-image
Operator is deployed via helm install from the local chart
Chainsaw tests from tests/e2e/keystone/ are executed
Job depends on gate jobs passing (lint, test, shellcheck, verify-codegen)

stories.title: Maintainer enforces component-level coverage thresholds
stories.want: a .codecov.yml file with component-level thresholds: 80% for internal/common/, 70% for operator controllers, 90% for webhooks/API
stories.so_that: coverage regressions are caught per-component rather than only at the project level
criteria: .codecov.yml exists at repository root
Component 'common' covers internal/common/** with 80% threshold
Component 'controllers' covers operators/*/internal/controller/** with 70% threshold
Component 'webhooks' covers operators/*/api/** with 90% threshold
Both project and patch status checks are configured

stories.title: Developer can build operator Docker images locally via Makefile
stories.want: make docker-build OPERATOR=keystone to build the operator Docker image locally
stories.so_that: I can test container builds without pushing to CI
criteria: make docker-build OPERATOR=keystone builds operators/keystone/Dockerfile
IMG variable controls the image tag (has sensible default)
Build context is the repository root (required by go.work)
Target replaces the current stub that errors with 'S006: docker-build not yet implemented'

stories.title: Developer can package Helm charts locally via Makefile
stories.want: make helm-package OPERATOR=keystone to package the operator Helm chart
stories.so_that: I can verify chart packaging locally before CI runs
criteria: make helm-package OPERATOR=keystone packages operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/
OPERATOR variable selects the chart directory
Target replaces the current stub that errors with 'S017: helm-package not yet implemented'
Packaged .tgz is output to the current directory

requirements.description: ci.yaml SHALL trigger on push to tags matching 'v*' in addition to existing branch triggers
requirements.rationale: Tag-triggered runs enable the full release pipeline (image build, chart push, GitHub Release) to execute on versioned commits

scenarios.name: Tag push triggers full pipeline
scenarios.when: a git tag matching v* (e.g. v0.1.0) is pushed
scenarios.then: all CI jobs execute including gate jobs, publish jobs, and the release job
and_then: cancel-in-progress remains false for tag pushes

scenarios.name: Existing triggers preserved
scenarios.when: a push to main or a PR targeting main occurs

scenarios.name: Non-matching tags ignored
scenarios.when: a tag not matching v* is pushed
scenarios.then: the CI workflow does not trigger

requirements.description: The test job SHALL use a matrix strategy over [common, keystone, c5c3] with -coverprofile output per matrix entry
requirements.rationale: Per-module coverage enables component-level threshold enforcement and regression visibility

scenarios.name: Matrix produces three parallel jobs
scenarios.then: three matrix entries execute: common, keystone, c5c3
and_then: each entry produces a distinct coverprofile file

requirements.description: The test-integration Makefile target SHALL run envtest-based integration tests with setup-envtest for kubebuilder assets
requirements.rationale: Integration tests validate controller logic against a real API server; the current stub must be replaced

scenarios.name: Target runs envtest tests
scenarios.then: envtest-based tests run for each operator with KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS set from setup-envtest

scenarios.name: Coverage profile produced
scenarios.then: a -coverprofile output file is generated per operator

requirements.description: codecov/codecov-action SHALL upload coverage with flag-based component separation in both test and test-integration jobs
requirements.rationale: Flag-based upload maps coverage data to .codecov.yml component definitions for threshold enforcement

scenarios.name: Unit test coverage uploaded with module flag
Integration test coverage uploaded with integration flag

requirements.description: The e2e-keystone job SHALL build operator image, load into kind, deploy via Helm, and run Chainsaw keystone tests
requirements.rationale: End-to-end testing validates operator functionality in a real cluster environment

scenarios.name: Image built and loaded into kind
scenarios.then: docker build + kind load docker-image succeed

scenarios.name: Operator deployed via Helm
scenarios.then: helm install deploys operator with image.tag override

requirements.description: The build-and-push job SHALL build operator image and push to GHCR with SemVer or SHA tags, conditional on main push or v* tag
requirements.rationale: Automated image publishing ensures versioned artifacts are available for deployment

scenarios.name: Main push produces SHA tag
scenarios.then: image pushed with commit SHA tag

requirements.description: The helm-push job SHALL package and push Helm chart to oci://ghcr.io/<owner>/charts/, conditional on main push or v* tag
requirements.rationale: OCI Helm chart publishing enables FluxCD to reference versioned charts from container registry

scenarios.name: Tag push produces versioned chart
scenarios.then: chart packaged with tag version, pushed to OCI registry

scenarios.name: Main push pushes chart
scenarios.then: chart packaged with default version, pushed to OCI registry

requirements.description: The github-release job SHALL create GitHub Release with auto-generated notes and Helm chart tarball on v* tags only
requirements.rationale: GitHub Releases provide discoverable changelog and downloadable artifacts for versioned releases

scenarios.name: Release created on tag push
scenarios.when: v* tag triggers pipeline and publish jobs complete
scenarios.then: gh release create is called with --generate-notes and chart tarball attached

requirements.description: The verify-codegen job SHALL run make manifests, make generate, git diff --exit-code, and make verify-crd-sync as a gate job
requirements.rationale: Prevents merging PRs with stale generated code or Helm CRD drift

scenarios.name: Stale deepcopy fails
scenarios.when: API types changed but make generate not run
scenarios.then: git diff --exit-code fails showing missing changes

scenarios.name: Stale CRD sync fails
scenarios.when: CRDs regenerated but Helm CRDs not synced

requirements.description: The docker-build Makefile target SHALL build Docker image from operators/$(OPERATOR)/Dockerfile with configurable OPERATOR and IMG variables
requirements.rationale: Replaces current stub; enables local builds and is used by e2e-keystone CI job

scenarios.name: Custom IMG tag
scenarios.when: make docker-build OPERATOR=keystone IMG=custom:tag is invoked

scenarios.name: Missing Dockerfile fails
scenarios.then: docker build fails with clear error

requirements.description: The helm-package Makefile target SHALL run helm package on operators/$(OPERATOR)/helm/$(OPERATOR)-operator/ with configurable OPERATOR variable
requirements.rationale: Replaces current stub; enables local packaging and used by helm-push and github-release CI jobs

scenarios.name: Version override
scenarios.when: make helm-package OPERATOR=keystone CHART_VERSION=1.2.3 is invoked

scenarios.name: Missing chart fails
scenarios.when: OPERATOR points to nonexistent chart directory
scenarios.then: helm package fails with clear error

requirements.description: The .codecov.yml SHALL define component thresholds: 80% internal/common/, 70% operator controllers, 90% operator API/webhooks
requirements.rationale: Component-level thresholds prevent low-coverage modules from being masked by high-coverage aggregate metrics

tasks.title: Implement docker-build Makefile target (REQ-010)
tasks.description: Replace the stubbed docker-build target in Makefile with a working implementation. Add IMG variable defaulting to ghcr.io/c5c3/$(OPERATOR)-operator:latest. The target runs docker build -t $(IMG) -f operators/$(OPERATOR)/Dockerfile . with context at repository root. Verify with make docker-build OPERATOR=keystone.

tasks.title: Implement helm-package Makefile target (REQ-011)
tasks.description: Replace the stubbed helm-package target in Makefile with a working implementation. Add optional CHART_VERSION variable; when set, pass --version $(CHART_VERSION) to helm package. The target runs helm package operators/$(OPERATOR)/helm/$(OPERATOR)-operator/ with optional --version flag. Verify with make helm-package OPERATOR=keystone.

tasks.title: Implement test-integration Makefile target (REQ-003)
tasks.description: Replace the stubbed test-integration target in Makefile. The target: (1) runs setup-envtest to get KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS path, (2) exports KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS, (3) for each operator in $(OPERATORS), runs go test with -tags=integration -coverprofile=cover-integration-$$op.out targeting ./operators/$$op/... packages. Uses SETUP_ENVTEST ?= setup-envtest variable. If no integration test files exist yet, the target should succeed gracefully (go test with build tag filtering will simply run zero tests).

tasks.title: Add v* tag trigger and permissions to ci.yaml (REQ-001)
tasks.description: Modify ci.yaml on.push to add tags: ['v*'] alongside existing branches: [main]. Add top-level permissions block for packages:write and contents:write (needed by publish and release jobs), using per-job permissions overrides to keep gate jobs at contents:read only. Verify YAML validity.

tasks.title: Refactor test job to matrix strategy with coverage (REQ-002, REQ-004)
tasks.description: Replace the single test job in ci.yaml with a matrix strategy. Matrix includes entries with module name and test path: common=./internal/common/..., keystone=./operators/keystone/..., c5c3=./operators/c5c3/.... Each entry runs go test <path> -coverprofile=cover-${{ matrix.module }}.out. Add codecov/codecov-action step after tests with: file pointing to coverprofile, flags set to ${{ matrix.module }}-unit, token from secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN, fail_ci_if_error: false.

tasks.title: Add test-integration CI job with matrix and coverage upload (REQ-003, REQ-004)
tasks.description: Add test-integration job to ci.yaml. Matrix over [keystone, c5c3]. Steps: checkout, setup-go, install setup-envtest (go install sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/tools/setup-envtest@latest), run make test-integration OPERATOR=${{ matrix.operator }}, upload coverage via codecov/codecov-action with flags [${{ matrix.operator }}-integration]. Pin action versions matching existing patterns (checkout@v6, setup-go@v6).

tasks.title: Add verify-codegen gate job to ci.yaml (REQ-009)
tasks.description: Add verify-codegen job to ci.yaml. Steps: checkout, setup-go, install controller-gen (go install sigs.k8s.io/controller-tools/cmd/controller-gen@latest), run 'make manifests && make generate', run 'git diff --exit-code' (fail with diff if generated files changed), run 'make verify-crd-sync'. Use same action pin hashes as existing jobs. Timeout: 10 minutes.

tasks.title: Add e2e-keystone job to ci.yaml (REQ-005)
tasks.description: Add e2e-keystone job to ci.yaml with needs: [lint, shellcheck, test, test-integration, verify-codegen]. Steps: checkout, setup-go, create kind cluster (helm/kind-action with hack/kind-config.yaml), install Flux CLI, install test deps (make install-test-deps), deploy infrastructure (make deploy-infra with SKIP_KIND_CREATE=true), build operator image (make docker-build OPERATOR=keystone IMG=keystone-operator:ci-test), load into kind (kind load docker-image keystone-operator:ci-test --name forge-e2e), helm install (helm install keystone-operator operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/ --set image.repository=keystone-operator --set image.tag=ci-test --set image.pullPolicy=Never), wait for operator pods, run Chainsaw tests (chainsaw test --config tests/e2e/chainsaw-config.yaml tests/e2e/keystone/), diagnostic dump on failure, upload JUnit report. Timeout: 30 minutes.

tasks.title: Add build-and-push job to ci.yaml (REQ-006)
tasks.description: Add build-and-push job to ci.yaml with needs: [lint, shellcheck, test, test-integration, verify-codegen] and condition: github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')). Job permissions: contents:read, packages:write. Steps: checkout, normalize owner (lowercase GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER), docker/setup-buildx-action, docker/login-action (GHCR), docker/metadata-action (tags: type=semver,pattern={{version}} for tags; type=sha for main), docker/build-push-action (file: operators/keystone/Dockerfile, context: ., push: true, tags/labels from metadata). Pin all actions with SHA hashes following existing build-images.yaml patterns.

tasks.title: Add helm-push job to ci.yaml (REQ-007)
tasks.description: Add helm-push job to ci.yaml with needs: [lint, shellcheck, test, test-integration, verify-codegen] and same push condition as build-and-push. Job permissions: contents:read, packages:write. Steps: checkout, install Helm (azure/setup-helm action), normalize owner, derive chart version from git tag (strip v prefix) or use Chart.yaml default, helm registry login to ghcr.io, make helm-package OPERATOR=keystone CHART_VERSION=<derived>, helm push <tgz> oci://ghcr.io/<owner>/charts/.

tasks.title: Add github-release job to ci.yaml (REQ-008)
tasks.description: Add github-release job to ci.yaml with needs: [build-and-push, helm-push] and condition: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v'). Job permissions: contents:write. Steps: checkout, install Helm, derive chart version, make helm-package OPERATOR=keystone CHART_VERSION=<derived>, gh release create ${{ github.ref_name }} --generate-notes with the .tgz file as release asset. Uses GITHUB_TOKEN for gh authentication.

tasks.title: Create .codecov.yml with component thresholds (REQ-012)
tasks.description: Create .codecov.yml at repository root. Configure: coverage.status.project with overall target, coverage.status.patch with default threshold. Define component_management.individual_components with three entries: (1) common — paths: ['internal/common/**'], target: 80%; (2) controllers — paths: ['operators/*/internal/controller/**'], target: 70%; (3) webhooks — paths: ['operators/*/api/**'], target: 90%. Add flag_management linking unit and integration flags.

tasks.title: Update docs/reference/ci-workflow.md to reflect new CI pipeline (REQ-001 through REQ-012)
tasks.description: Update the existing docs/reference/ci-workflow.md to document all new jobs: test (matrix), test-integration, verify-codegen, e2e-keystone, build-and-push, helm-push, github-release. Document the v* tag trigger, permissions model, job dependency graph, Codecov integration, and Makefile target changes (docker-build, helm-package, test-integration). Include the mermaid job dependency diagram from the feature elaboration. Remove the 'Disabled Jobs' section for test-integration since it's now active.

review_criteria: All SHALL requirements (REQ-001 through REQ-012) have corresponding CI jobs, Makefile targets, or config files implemented
Existing CI jobs (lint, shellcheck, docs, e2e-infra) are completely unchanged — no modifications to their steps, actions, or configuration
All GitHub Actions are pinned by SHA hash (not tag) following the existing pattern in ci.yaml and build-images.yaml
SPDX license header present on all new and modified files following the Copyright 2026 SAP SE pattern
Publish jobs (build-and-push, helm-push) are conditional on main push or v* tag — never run on PRs
github-release job is conditional on v* tags only and depends on both publish jobs completing
Codecov upload uses fail_ci_if_error: false to prevent fork PRs from failing due to missing CODECOV_TOKEN
Makefile targets (docker-build, helm-package, test-integration) support OPERATOR variable override consistently with existing targets
docs/reference/ci-workflow.md accurately reflects all new jobs, triggers, and configuration
ci.yaml YAML is valid and jobs have correct needs: dependencies forming the expected DAG
implementation_notes:
## Architecture

This feature extends the existing CI pipeline (ci.yaml) from 5 jobs to 11 jobs organized in a DAG:

```
Gate Jobs (always):
  lint ─────────────┐
  shellcheck ───────┤
  verify-codegen ───┤
  test (matrix) ────┼──> E2E Jobs + Publish Jobs
  test-integration ─┘

E2E Jobs (depends on gates):
  e2e-infra (existing, unchanged)
  e2e-keystone (new)

Publish Jobs (main/tags, depends on gates):
  build-and-push ───┐
  helm-push ────────┼──> Release Job
                    │
Release Job (v* tags only):
  github-release ───┘

Independent:
  docs (existing, unchanged)
```

## Key Decisions

1. **Permissions model**: Top-level permissions stay minimal (contents:read). Jobs needing packages:write (publish) or contents:write (release) declare per-job permissions blocks. This follows least-privilege principle from existing ci.yaml.

2. **Matrix strategy for tests**: Uses include-style matrix with module name and test path rather than a simple list, enabling different go test paths for common (./internal/common/...) vs operators (./operators/<op>/...).

3. **setup-envtest in CI**: The test-integration job installs setup-envtest via `go install` rather than downloading a binary, because the Go toolchain is already set up and this ensures version compatibility.

4. **Image tag for E2E**: Uses `ci-test` as the image tag for e2e-keystone (not `:latest`) and sets `imagePullPolicy: Never` in Helm values to ensure the kind-loaded image is used.

5. **Chart version derivation**: The helm-push and github-release jobs derive chart version from the git tag by stripping the `v` prefix. On main pushes, the default version from Chart.yaml is used.

6. **Codecov fail_ci_if_error: false**: Fork PRs don't have access to CODECOV_TOKEN. Setting fail_ci_if_error: false prevents CI from failing due to upload issues on forks.

## Files Modified

- `.github/workflows/ci.yaml` — Major extension (trigger, 6 new jobs, 1 refactored job)
- `Makefile` — Replace 3 stubs (docker-build, helm-package, test-integration)
- `.codecov.yml` — New file
- `docs/reference/ci-workflow.md` — Updated documentation

## Patterns to Follow

- **Action pinning**: Pin all GitHub Actions by SHA hash with version comment, as done in existing ci.yaml (e.g. `actions/checkout@de0fac2...  # v6`)
- **SPDX headers**: All files start with `# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright 2026 SAP SE` 
- **Makefile conventions**: Use `@` prefix for silent execution, `$(error ...)` for intentional failures, `$(OPERATORS)` variable for iteration
- **GHCR login pattern**: From build-images.yaml — docker/login-action with registry: ghcr.io, username: github.actor, password: secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN
- **Owner normalization**: From build-images.yaml — `echo "owner=${GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER,,}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"` for lowercase owner
